seoTitle: Allegro MicroSystems News | Product Releases, Technology Updates | BeiLuo
seoDescription: Latest news from Allegro MicroSystems including new product releases, technology innovations, and industry partnerships. Stay updated with Allegro developments.

faqs.question: What are Allegro's latest product releases?
faqs.answer: Allegro MicroSystems continuously releases innovative products: 1) ACS37610 - high-current busbar sensor with ±200A range and 1MHz bandwidth for EV applications; 2) AMT49105 - automotive BLDC motor driver with sensorless control; 3) A80803 - matrix LED driver for adaptive driving beam headlights; 4) A31301 - 3D magnetic sensor for advanced position sensing; 5) ACS37800 - digital output current sensor with I2C interface and integrated diagnostics. These products address growing demand in electric vehicles, ADAS, and industrial automation. BeiLuo Electronics stocks these latest products and provides technical support for evaluation and integration. Contact our sales team for availability and samples.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact BeiLuo for latest Allegro product availability and technical support for new releases.

faqs.question: How is Allegro supporting the electric vehicle market?
faqs.answer: Allegro is heavily invested in electric vehicle technology with comprehensive solutions: 1) Battery Management - high-voltage isolated current sensors (ACS37610) for pack monitoring with 4.8kV isolation; 2) Motor Control - BLDC drivers for electric pumps, cooling fans, and traction motors; 3) Charging Infrastructure - current sensors for DC fast chargers and onboard chargers; 4) Position Sensing - angle sensors for steering, braking, and transmission systems; 5) Safety Systems - magnetic sensors for contactor position and isolation monitoring. Allegro's AEC-Q100 qualified products meet automotive reliability requirements. The company has seen 40%+ revenue growth in EV-related products. New product development focuses on higher bandwidth (> 1MHz), higher isolation (> 5kV), and functional safety (ASIL-D) for next-generation EVs.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAEs for Allegro EV solutions in battery management, motor control, and charging systems.

faqs.question: What industries does Allegro serve?
faqs.answer: Allegro MicroSystems serves diverse industries with specialized sensing and power solutions: 1) Automotive - EV/HEV battery management, ADAS, powertrain, body electronics (60% of revenue); 2) Industrial Automation - motor drives, robotics, factory automation; 3) Energy - solar inverters, energy storage, smart grid; 4) Data Center - power delivery, cooling systems; 5) Consumer Electronics - appliances, power tools, white goods; 6) Medical - imaging equipment, patient monitoring. The automotive sector is the largest and fastest-growing market, driven by electrification trends. Industrial automation is the second largest, with increasing demand for energy-efficient motor control. Allegro's products are essential components in critical systems requiring high reliability and safety.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our industry-specialized FAEs for Allegro solutions tailored to your specific application.

faqs.question: How can I stay updated on Allegro news and announcements?
faqs.answer: Stay informed about Allegro MicroSystems through: 1) BeiLuo Electronics newsletter - monthly updates on Allegro products, technical articles, and events; 2) Allegro website - news section at allegromicro.com/news; 3) Press releases - distributed through major electronics media; 4) Trade shows - Allegro participates in electronica, APEC, and automotive electronics conferences; 5) Webinars - technical presentations on new products and applications; 6) Social media - LinkedIn updates on company news. BeiLuo also hosts local technical seminars featuring Allegro products. Contact your BeiLuo sales representative to be added to our distribution list for regular updates on Allegro product launches, technology updates, and application insights.
faqs.decisionGuide: Subscribe to BeiLuo newsletter and follow Allegro announcements for regular updates.

faqs.question: What is Allegro's approach to innovation and technology development?
faqs.answer: Allegro MicroSystems focuses innovation on key technology areas: 1) Magnetic Sensing - advancing Hall-effect and TMR technology for higher accuracy and bandwidth; 2) Power Integration - combining sensing and power management in single packages; 3) Functional Safety - developing ASIL-compliant products for safety-critical automotive systems; 4) Wide Bandgap Support - creating sensors compatible with SiC and GaN power devices; 5) Miniaturization - reducing package size while maintaining performance. R&D investment is approximately 12% of revenue annually. The company holds over 1,000 patents in magnetic sensing and power IC technology. Strategic partnerships with automotive OEMs and Tier 1 suppliers drive product roadmaps. Allegro's innovation priorities align with industry megatrends: vehicle electrification, autonomous driving, and energy efficiency.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact BeiLuo to learn about latest Allegro innovations and how they can benefit your designs.

articles.title: Allegro Introduces ACS37610 High-Current Sensor for EV Applications
articles.summary: Allegro MicroSystems launches the ACS37610, a ±200A current sensor with 1MHz bandwidth and 4.8kV isolation targeting electric vehicle battery management systems.
content: Allegro MicroSystems has announced the ACS37610, a breakthrough high-current sensor designed specifically for electric vehicle battery management and high-power motor drive applications.
The ACS37610 sets new benchmarks for integrated current sensing:
The sensor addresses critical EV requirements:
- Fast fault protection for short-circuit conditions
- Robust operation in noisy automotive environments
The ACS37610 offers significant improvements over previous generations:
The ACS37610 targets the rapidly growing EV market:
- Global EV sales expected to reach 40% of new vehicles by 2030
- Battery management systems require precision current sensing
The ACS37610 is sampling now with production quantities available in Q3 2026. BeiLuo Electronics provides evaluation boards and technical support.
articles.author: Allegro MicroSystems Press Release

articles.title: New AMT49105 BLDC Driver Targets Automotive Electric Pumps and Fans
articles.summary: Allegro releases the AMT49105, a highly integrated BLDC motor driver with sensorless control and automotive qualification for electric pumps and cooling fans.
content: Allegro MicroSystems has expanded its motor driver portfolio with the AMT49105, a fully integrated three-phase BLDC motor driver designed for automotive electric pumps and cooling fans.
The AMT49105 integrates all functions for BLDC motor control:
- BEMF sensing for rotor position detection
- Start-up algorithms for reliable initial commutation
The device meets stringent automotive requirements:
The AMT49105 is available now in a compact QFN package. BeiLuo Electronics provides evaluation kits with demonstration software.
articles.author: Allegro Product Marketing

articles.title: Allegro Reports 40% Growth in EV-Related Product Revenue
articles.summary: Allegro MicroSystems announces strong growth in electric vehicle applications driven by battery management and motor control solutions.
content: Allegro MicroSystems has reported 40% year-over-year growth in revenue from electric vehicle-related products, highlighting the company's strong position in the rapidly expanding EV market.
Key factors driving EV revenue growth:
- BLDC motor drivers for pumps and fans (AMT49105)
- Position sensors for steering and braking
Allegro is expanding EV product portfolio:
- Higher bandwidth sensors for SiC inverters
Major OEM and Tier 1 design wins:
The company is investing $100M in capacity expansion to meet growing demand.
articles.author: Allegro Investor Relations

articles.title: Allegro A80803 Enables Adaptive Driving Beam Headlights
articles.summary: Allegro introduces the A80803 matrix LED controller for next-generation adaptive driving beam (ADB) headlight systems.
content: Allegro MicroSystems has launched the A80803, a highly integrated matrix LED controller designed for adaptive driving beam (ADB) headlight applications in premium vehicles.
The A80803 controls multiple LED segments independently:
- Up to 12 LED channels per device
Integrated safety functions for automotive lighting:
The device interfaces with vehicle systems:
- 30% of premium vehicles have ADB by 2025
The A80803 is sampling now with automotive OEMs.
articles.author: Allegro Automotive Group

articles.title: Allegro A31301 3D Magnetic Sensor Enables Advanced Position Sensing
articles.summary: Allegro releases the A31301, a 3D magnetic sensor measuring X, Y, Z axes for complex position and motion detection applications.
content: Allegro MicroSystems has introduced the A31301, a three-axis magnetic sensor capable of measuring magnetic field strength in X, Y, and Z directions simultaneously.
The A31301 provides complete magnetic field information:
The A31301 is available now in a small QFN package.
articles.author: Allegro Sensor Group

articles.title: Allegro Commits to Carbon Neutrality by 2035
articles.summary: Allegro MicroSystems announces comprehensive sustainability plan including carbon neutrality commitment and green product development.
content: Allegro MicroSystems has announced an ambitious sustainability initiative, committing to achieve carbon neutrality across its operations by 2035.
Allegro's path to carbon neutrality includes:
The company is investing $20M in sustainability initiatives over the next 5 years.
articles.author: Allegro Corporate Communications
